lesson_title: Tlamachtiliztli 31 Tlacotōntli huan tlaochpanāliztli: Cleansing ceremonies, the conditional. Part 2)
utterance_original: “nicān nēci mitzcocōliah, moxīcoah cequinoqueh pampa ta axtlen mitzpoloā, ticpiya tequitl, ticpiya cualli tequitl, axcanah tiquincāhua motatahhuan in incelti, eli tiquinpalehuia īcā cē quēntzin tlaxtlahuilli, cualli tiitztoc, ahachica tihuāllauh tiquinpaxaloā motatahhuan.
utterance_normalized: “nicān nēci mitzcocōliah, moxīcoah cequinoqueh pampa ta axtlen mitzpoloā, ticpiya tequitl, ticpiya cualli tequitl, axcanah tiquincāhua motatahhuan in incelti, eli tiquinpalehuia īcā cē quēntzin tlaxtlahuilli, cualli tiitztoc, ahachica tihuāllauh tiquinpaxaloā motatahhuan.
communicative_function: Tlamachtiliztli 31 Tlacotōntli huan tlaochpanāliztli: Cleansing ceremonies, the conditional. Part 2)

lesson_title: Tlamachtiliztli 31 Tlacotōntli huan tlaochpanāliztli: Cleansing ceremonies, the conditional. Part 2)
utterance_original: cuaxīlōtl īcuayo huan nehpalli, quitehtequi ciltic huan quiāmaneloā īcā ātl huan quēuhquinon quicāhuah ma elto pampa ni motequihuia quēmman nochi tlamiya quichīhua ītequiuh.
utterance_normalized: cuaxīlōtl īcuayo huan nehpalli, quitehtequi ciltic huan quiāmaneloā īcā ātl huan quēuhquinon quicāhuah ma elto pampa ni motequihuia quēmman nochi tlamiya quichīhua ītequiuh.
communicative_function: Tlamachtiliztli 31 Tlacotōntli huan tlaochpanāliztli: Cleansing ceremonies, the conditional. Part 2)
